description: 巫师3昆特牌全卡牌数据（含石之心、血与酒DLC）

leaders.name: Foltest: The Siegemaster
leaders.name_cn: 弗尔泰斯特：攻城大师
leaders.ability: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units (unless a Commander's Horn is already present on that row).
leaders.ability_cn: 使你所有攻城单位力量翻倍（若该行已有指挥号角则无效）

leaders.name: Foltest: The Steel-Forged
leaders.name_cn: 弗尔泰斯特：钢铸之王
leaders.ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all his/her Siege units is 10 or more.
leaders.ability_cn: 若敌方所有攻城单位总力量≥10，摧毁其最强攻城单位

leaders.name: Foltest: King of Temeria
leaders.name_cn: 弗尔泰斯特：泰莫利亚之王
leaders.ability: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.
leaders.ability_cn: 从牌组中选一张浓雾牌立即打出

leaders.name: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
leaders.name_cn: 弗尔泰斯特：北方统帅
leaders.ability: Clear any weather effects in play.
leaders.ability_cn: 清除场上所有天气效果

leaders.name: Foltest: Son of Medell
leaders.name_cn: 弗尔泰斯特：梅德尔之子
leaders.ability: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his/her Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
leaders.ability_cn: 若敌方所有远程单位总力量≥10，摧毁其最强远程单位

leaders.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
leaders.name_cn: 恩希尔·恩瑞斯：尼弗迦德皇帝
leaders.ability: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.
leaders.ability_cn: 随机查看对手手牌中的3张卡

leaders.name: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
leaders.name_cn: 恩希尔·恩瑞斯：陛下
leaders.ability: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.
leaders.ability_cn: 从牌组中选一张暴雨牌立即打出

leaders.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The White Flame
leaders.name_cn: 恩希尔·恩瑞斯：白色火焰
leaders.ability: Cancel your opponent's Leader Ability.
leaders.ability_cn: 取消对手的领袖技能

leaders.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The Relentless
leaders.name_cn: 恩希尔·恩瑞斯：冷血无情
leaders.ability: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.
leaders.ability_cn: 从对手的弃牌堆中抽取一张卡

leaders.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
leaders.name_cn: 恩希尔·恩瑞斯：北方入侵者
leaders.ability: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.
leaders.ability_cn: 恢复单位到战场的技能将随机选择单位。影响双方

leaders.name: Francesca Findabair: The Beautiful
leaders.name_cn: 弗兰切斯卡·芬达贝尔：美人
leaders.ability: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is already present on that row).
leaders.ability_cn: 使你所有远程单位力量翻倍（若该行已有指挥号角则无效）

leaders.name: Francesca Findabair: Daisy of the Valley
leaders.name_cn: 弗兰切斯卡·芬达贝尔：谷中雏菊
leaders.ability: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.
leaders.ability_cn: 战斗开始时额外抽一张牌

leaders.name: Francesca Findabair: Pureblood Elf
leaders.name_cn: 弗兰切斯卡·芬达贝尔：纯血精灵
leaders.ability: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.
leaders.ability_cn: 从牌组中选一张霜霰牌立即打出

leaders.name: Francesca Findabair: Queen of Dol Blathanna
leaders.name_cn: 弗兰切斯卡·芬达贝尔：多尔布雷坦纳女王
leaders.ability: Destroy your enemy's Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all his/her Close Combat units is 10 or more.
leaders.ability_cn: 若敌方所有近战单位总力量≥10，摧毁其最强近战单位

leaders.name: Francesca Findabair: Hope of the Aen Seidhe
leaders.name_cn: 弗兰切斯卡·芬达贝尔：艾因·谢迪之望
leaders.ability: Move agile units to whichever valid row maximizes their strength.
leaders.ability_cn: 将敏捷单位移动到能使其力量最大化的行

leaders.name: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
leaders.name_cn: 埃瑞丁：狂猎之王
leaders.ability: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.
leaders.ability_cn: 从牌组中选任意天气牌立即打出

leaders.name: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
leaders.name_cn: 埃瑞丁：红骑士统领
leaders.ability: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units (unless a Commander's Horn is already present on that row).
leaders.ability_cn: 使你所有近战单位力量翻倍（若该行已有指挥号角则无效）

leaders.name: Eredin: Bringer of Death
leaders.name_cn: 埃瑞丁：死亡使者
leaders.ability: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.
leaders.ability_cn: 从弃牌堆中恢复一张卡到手牌

leaders.name: Eredin: Destroyer of Worlds
leaders.name_cn: 埃瑞丁：灭世者
leaders.ability: Discard 2 cards and draw 1 card of your choice from your deck.
leaders.ability_cn: 弃置2张卡，从牌组中选取1张卡

leaders.name: Eredin Breacc Glas: The Treacherous
leaders.name_cn: 埃瑞丁：叛徒
leaders.ability: Doubles strength of all spies.
leaders.ability_cn: 使所有间谍牌力量翻倍

leaders.name: Crach an Craite
leaders.name_cn: 克拉奇·奎特
leaders.ability: Shuffles all cards from each player's graveyard back into their decks.
leaders.ability_cn: 将双方弃牌堆中的所有卡牌洗回各自牌组

leaders.name: King Bran
leaders.name_cn: 布朗王
leaders.ability: Units affected by inclement weather only lose half their strength.
leaders.ability_cn: 受恶劣天气影响的单位只损失一半力量

neutral.ability: Sets all Close Combat units to strength 1 for both players

neutral.name: Impenetrable Fog
neutral.ability: Sets all Ranged Combat units to strength 1 for both players
neutral.ability_cn: 将双方所有远程单位力量降为1

neutral.name: Torrential Rain
neutral.ability: Sets all Siege units to strength 1 for both players

neutral.name: Commander's Horn
neutral.ability: Doubles the strength of all unit cards in that row
neutral.ability_cn: 使该行所有单位牌力量翻倍

neutral.name: Scorch
neutral.ability: Kills the strongest card(s) on the battlefield
neutral.ability_cn: 摧毁战场上最强的卡牌

neutral.name: Decoy
neutral.ability: Swap with a card on the battlefield to return it to your hand
neutral.ability_cn: 与战场上一张卡互换，将该卡收回手中

card_types_explanation.Hero: 英雄牌：不受任何天气牌或特殊牌影响
card_types_explanation.Unit: 普通单位牌：受天气和特殊效果影响
card_types_explanation.Weather: 天气牌：影响战场特定行的所有单位
card_types_explanation.Special: 特殊牌：提供各种战术效果（诱饵、号角、灼烧）
card_types_explanation.Leader: 领袖牌：每场比赛使用一次的特殊能力

abilities_explanation.Hero: 不受任何特殊牌或技能影响
abilities_explanation.Spy: 放置在对方战场（算入对方分数），从自己牌组抽2张牌
abilities_explanation.Medic: 从弃牌堆选一张单位牌（非英雄/特殊牌）立即打出
abilities_explanation.Tight Bond: 与同名牌相邻放置时，两张牌力量均翻倍
abilities_explanation.Morale Boost: 同行所有其他单位+1力量
abilities_explanation.Muster: 从牌组/手牌中召唤所有同名牌立即打出
abilities_explanation.Agile: 可放置在近战行或远程行
abilities_explanation.Commander's Horn: 该行所有单位力量翻倍
abilities_explanation.Scorch: 摧毁战场上力量最高的卡牌
abilities_explanation.Decoy: 与战场上一张非英雄卡互换，将该卡收回手中
abilities_explanation.Berserker: 受玛奪蘑（Mardroeme）激活后变身为更强的单位
abilities_explanation.Summon Avenger: 该卡被移出战场后，召唤一张强力单位牌取代之
abilities_explanation.Mardroeme: 触发同行所有狂战士卡的变身

faction_abilities.Northern Realms: 赢得一局后，从牌组中额外抽一张牌
faction_abilities.Nilfgaardian Empire: 每场比赛平局时，尼弗迦德玩家获胜
faction_abilities.Monsters: 每局结束时，随机保留一张打出的卡牌到下一局
faction_abilities.Skellige: 第三局开始时，从弃牌堆随机复活2张卡牌到战场
